LanguageData.RimChat_BriefJoy.stages.0.label: moment of joy
LanguageData.RimChat_BriefJoy.stages.0.description: That brief moment of joy lifted my spirits.
LanguageData.RimChat_BriefSadness.stages.0.label: brief sadness
LanguageData.RimChat_BriefSadness.stages.0.descriptio: That fleeting sadness still lingers slightly.
LanguageData.RimChat_SurpriseReaction.stages.0.label: surprised
LanguageData.RimChat_SurpriseReaction.stages.0.descri: The unexpected exchange caught me off guard.
LanguageData.RimChat_DisgustReaction.stages.0.label: disgusted
LanguageData.RimChat_DisgustReaction.stages.0.descrip: That remark left me feeling disgusted.
LanguageData.RimChat_Encouraged.stages.0.label: encouraged
LanguageData.RimChat_Encouraged.stages.0.description: Their words of encouragement boosted my spirits.
LanguageData.RimChat_Comforted.stages.0.label: comforted
LanguageData.RimChat_Comforted.stages.0.description: Being comforted brought me some peace.
LanguageData.RimChat_Mocked.stages.0.label: mocked
LanguageData.RimChat_Mocked.stages.0.description: They mocked me and it stings.
LanguageData.RimChat_Teased.stages.0.label: teased
LanguageData.RimChat_Teased.stages.0.description: Being teased left me feeling embarrassed.
LanguageData.RimChat_Praised.stages.0.label: praised
LanguageData.RimChat_Praised.stages.0.description: Their praise made me feel appreciated.
LanguageData.RimChat_FeelingInsulted.stages.0.label: feeling insulted
LanguageData.RimChat_FeelingInsulted.stages.0.descrip: I was deeply insulted by those words.
LanguageData.RimChat_FeelingIgnored.stages.0.label: feeling ignored
LanguageData.RimChat_FeelingIgnored.stages.0.descript: Being ignored stings more than words can say.
LanguageData.RimChat_HeartfeltCompliment.stages.0.des: Their genuine compliment made me feel valued.
LanguageData.RimChat_GratefulFeeling.stages.0.label: feeling grateful
LanguageData.RimChat_GratefulFeeling.stages.0.descrip: I'm grateful for what they said.
LanguageData.RimChat_ShamefulMoment.stages.0.label: feeling shameful
LanguageData.RimChat_ShamefulMoment.stages.0.descript: I'm ashamed of how that conversation went.
LanguageData.RimChat_ProudMoment.stages.0.label: feeling proud
LanguageData.RimChat_ProudMoment.stages.0.description: That exchange made me feel proud.
LanguageData.RimChat_ResentfulFeeling.stages.0.label: feeling resentful
LanguageData.RimChat_ResentfulFeeling.stages.0.descri: I can't shake this feeling of resentment.
LanguageData.RimChat_LonelyFeeling.stages.0.label: feeling lonely
LanguageData.RimChat_LonelyFeeling.stages.0.descripti: Their words made me feel more alone than before.
LanguageData.RimChat_TrustBetrayed.stages.0.label: trust betrayed
LanguageData.RimChat_TrustBetrayed.stages.0.descripti: They betrayed my trust in a meaningful way.
LanguageData.RimChat_DeepConnection.stages.0.label: deep connection
LanguageData.RimChat_DeepConnection.stages.0.descript: That conversation created a real connection.
LanguageData.RimChat_EmpoweringTalk.stages.0.label: empowering conversation
LanguageData.RimChat_EmpoweringTalk.stages.0.descript: Speaking with them left me feeling empowered.
LanguageData.RimChat_DebilitatingWords.stages.0.label: debilitating words
LanguageData.RimChat_DebilitatingWords.stages.0.descr: Their words have really gotten to me.
LanguageData.RimChat_UnforgettableMoment.stages.0.des: That exchange is something I won't forget.
LanguageData.RimChat_WoundingMemory.stages.0.label: wounding memory
LanguageData.RimChat_WoundingMemory.stages.0.descript: That conversation left a lasting wound.
LanguageData.RimChat_LoveAndDestruction.stages.0.desc: "I can't live without you, but I can't live with you either." These words haunt my mind.
LanguageData.RimChat_GoodAndEvilConflict.stages.0.des: The conscience in my sins questions everything I've done.
LanguageData.RimChat_LateRegret.stages.0.label: late regret
LanguageData.RimChat_LateRegret.stages.0.description: When you finally understand, it's already too late.
LanguageData.RimChat_UnconditionalCompassion.stages.0: Even if the world is full of evil, I still choose to understand.
LanguageData.RimChat_JoyInSuffering.stages.0.label: joy in suffering
LanguageData.RimChat_JoyInSuffering.stages.0.descript: Life is absurd, but I still choose to live on.
